Mission Description: Get a player to respond with "What?" after you say "Guess what?"
Get someone to order a drink from you using a fake, complex name (e.g., "Zebra Mocha").
Get someone to say the food is "too salty" or "too sweet."
Convince someone there is a "secret ingredient" in the food that isn't actually there.
Get a player to describe the best meal they have ever had in detail.
Get someone to ask you if you have any food allergies.
Ask three people how they like their coffee and get them all to answer.
Get someone to admit they prefer savory snacks over sweet snacks.
Convince a player that something store-bought was actually homemade.
Get someone to try a "weird" food combination (e.g., fries in ice cream).
Get someone to ask you for the recipe for a dish you didn't actually cook.
Get a player to describe the "tasting notes" of their drink like a sommelier.
Convince someone that it’s acceptable to eat dessert before the main meal.
Get three people to stand in a circle and "rotate" positions with you.
Get someone (who isn't a player) to explain the role of a Libero to you.
Get a player to do a high-five line with you after a minor "win."
Toss a paper ball into the air and get someone to "spike" it.
Ask a player which they prefer: Setting or Hitting.
Get a player to make the "in" or "out" signal with their hands.
Start a conversation about the best service ace you've ever seen.
Get someone to touch a ball three times in a row within 10 seconds.
Get a player to mention they need (or forgot) their knee pads.
Get a player to demonstrate their serving motion to you.
Start a debate and get someone to say "Original Japanese is better."
Get someone to say a famous anime catchphrase (e.g., "Believe it!").
Get a player to strike a "power-up" pose (like Dragon Ball Z).
Get a non-anime fan to agree to watch one full episode of a show you suggest.
Get a player to say the full name of a character from an anime they haven't seen.
Get a player to hum the opening theme song of a popular anime.
Comment on someone’s clothes and get them to say it looks like an anime outfit.
Convince a player that you prefer reading manga to watching anime.
Get a player to use a Japanese word like "Nani" or "Kawaii" in context.
Get a player to shout the name of a fictional anime attack.
Make another player yawn (usually by yawning first yourself).
Get a player to give you three high fives in less than one minute.
Hide your mission card in someone's pocket/hood for 30 seconds undetected.
Get a player to do the "Chicken Dance" for at least 5 seconds.
Convince a player to invent a 4-part secret handshake with you.
Get a player to touch their own ears.
Get a player to agree to swap their shoes with yours for 5 minutes.
Hide this card in a book and get another player to find it.
Get a player to give up their seat to you without you asking for it.
Get someone to hold your drink for more than 60 seconds.
Get three people to pose for a "dramatic movie poster" photo with you.
Get a player to lend you a pen or pencil.
Get a player to ask you why you are still wearing (or took off) your jacket.
Put your bag on someone and get them to wear it for 60 seconds.
Balance a spoon on your nose and get a player to compliment it.
Get a player to moonwalk for at least three steps.
Get a player to stand on one leg for 30 seconds.
Get a player to point in the direction they think is North.
Get someone to talk about their high school experience.
Get a player to say the word "Iridescent."
Get a player to quote a famous movie line.
Invent a word and get someone to ask you what it means.
Sing the wrong lyrics to a song and get someone to correct you.
Get someone to explain the rules of a sport they like to you.
Get someone to tell you where they'd go if they won a free vacation.
Get someone to tell you their favorite color, food, and movie.
Get a player to say "Purple" when describing something other than color.
Tell a simple riddle and get someone to give the correct answer.
Get someone to tell you the time without checking your phone first.
Get someone to show you a picture of their pet.
Convince someone to tell you a "secret" (can be a fake one).
Get someone to complain about the weather twice in one conversation.
Get someone to tell you which celebrity they are most often compared to.
Get someone to describe their very first part-time job.
Get three people to tell you their middle names.
Get a player to correctly guess a number you are thinking of (1-5).
Get a player to count to 10 in a language other than English.
Get a player to say the alphabet backward from M to A.
Get a player to repeat a tongue twister three times perfectly.
Convince a player to speak in a fake accent for 60 seconds.
Tell a fake "fact" and get someone to believe it.
Get a player to win a game of Rock-Paper-Scissors against you.
Get a player to whistle a specific tune you suggest.
Get someone to draw a quick picture of an animal for you.
Get a player to teach you a 'magic trick' or a quick 'life hack'.
Fold this card into a shape and get someone to compliment it.
Get a player to mimic your exact movements for 30 seconds.
Get a player to attempt to beatbox for you.
Challenge a player to a coin flip and get them to call "heads."
Challenge a player to a thumb war and get them to win.
Get a player to lose a staring contest against you.
Get a player to attempt a handstand or cartwheel.
Get a player to compliment your hair or your outfit.
Get a player to repeat exactly what you said three times in a row.
Tell a joke and get at least three people to laugh at the same time.
Get a player to ask you to take a photo of them with their phone.
Start singing a simple song and get another person to join in.
Get a player to stand up and clap for something you just did.
Get someone to let you write a nickname on a piece of tape and stick it on them.
Successfully leave a room without anyone noticing for 5 minutes.
Get at least 4 people to do a high-five line with you.
Get someone to teach you a specific dance move.
Get someone to show you the last photo they took on their phone.
Convince someone to close their eyes while you "give them a surprise" (can be a snack).
Get someone to "fix" a small non-issue on your phone.
Get a group to agree on a "team name" for themselves.
Do something that makes a player stop and look twice at you.
